chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.840 of 2025 _______________________________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on M.A. No.4705 of 2025. 2. For order on M.A. No.4706 of 2025 3. For hearing of bail application 27.03.2025 Mr. Naseer Nehal Hashmi, advocate for the Applicant along with applicant Abdul Kareem Ansari. ======== 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through this bail application, applicant/accused Abdul Kaleem Ansari son of Muhammad Ishaq Ansari, seeks protective bail in FIR No.47 of 2025 registered for the offence under section 489-F PPC registered at PS Gulshan-eJohar, Karachi. Per learned counsel, applicant/accused is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case by the complainant with malafide intention and ulterior motives; that after registration of the FIR, the applicant/accused intends to surrender before the Sessions Court Islamabad but apprehends his arrest at the hands of police. He lastly prays for grant of protective bail to the applicant/accused enabling him to surrender before the concerned Sessions Court. Without touching the merits and de-merits of the case, the protective bail is granted to the applicant/accused above named for a period of Twelve days from today enabling him to approach and surrender before the concerned Sessions Court against solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. It is made clear that this order shall cease to operate upto 07.04.2025 or when the applicant/accused approaches the Court having jurisdiction whichever is earlier.

Without touching the merits and de-merits of the case, the protective bail is granted to the applicant/accused above named for a period of Twelve days from today enabling him to approach and surrender before the concerned Sessions Court against solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) with P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. It is made clear that this order shall cease to operate upto 07.04.2025 or when the applicant/accused approaches the Court having jurisdiction whichever is earlier. This Bail Application stands disposed of. J U D G E Manthar Brohi
